description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for continuous integration tests that runs on pull requests, pushes, and daily. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-13), Python versions (3.8-3.12, 3.x), architectures (x64, x86), and test categories. It checks out the repository, sets up Python, upgrades pip, installs dependencies, and runs tests with tox.
